notes_zh:
- **新增** 链接显示原始网址开关：可选择在列表中显示网址或页面标题
- **新增** 网页预览开关：关闭后显示静态卡片，支持一键在浏览器中打开
- **优化** 网页预览默认静音，禁止自动播放媒体
- **修复** 关闭预览窗口后媒体仍然播放的问题
- **优化** 重新组织设置页面结构
notes_en:
- **New** Link display toggle: choose to show raw URL or page title in history list
- **New** Web preview toggle: when off, shows a static card with one-click browser open
- **Improve** Web preview now mutes all media by default, prevents autoplay
- **Fix** Media continues playing after closing preview window
- **Improve** Reorganized settings layout
